text:
Days ago I experienced the following problem
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=202770

because on webpage [1] there are no infos about obligation to enable dbus service in order to let KDE working correctly.


[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/x11-wm.html
